children.heading: Developmental disability
children.label: 1 Developmental disability
children.text: The term “developmental disability” has the meaning given the term in .section 15002 of this title

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 2 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in section 1141 of title 20.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.
